sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_data (index UInt64, geo_date DateTime, description String);
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS area, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM geo_date) AS year FROM geo_data WHERE geo_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EXTRACT(DAY FROM toDate(geo_date)) AS day, h3CellAreaM2(index) FROM geo_data WHERE index IN (SELECT index FROM geo_data WHERE geo_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31');
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS area, COUNT(*) FROM geo_data GROUP BY area HAVING area > 0;

SELECT a.index, h3CellAreaM2(a.index) AS area, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.geo_date) AS month FROM geo_data a JOIN geo_data b ON h3CellAreaM2(a.index) > h3CellAreaM2(b.index) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.geo_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM b.geo_date);
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(NULLIF(index, 0)) AS area, EXTRACT(SECOND FROM geo_date) AS second FROM geo_data WHERE index IS NOT NULL;
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS area, ROUND(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM geo_date), 2) AS minute FROM geo_data WHERE index = '579205133326352384';
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS area, EXTRACT(DAY FROM geo_date) AS day FROM geo_data WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM geo_date) = 10 HAVING area IS NOT NULL;
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(CAST(index AS UInt64)) AS area, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM geo_date) AS year FROM geo_data WHERE index = '579205133326352383';
